```css title=main.css
.\.\/_f\.module_\.\/_f-1--\/__idIkJ-\<idI {
    color: black;
}
.\.\/_f\.module_\.\/_f--\/__qZ3ONg\<qZ3 {
    
}

.\.\/_d\.module_\.\/_d-1--\/__HsdNMd\<Hsd {
    color: green;
}

.\.\/_d\.module_\.\/_d--\/__G5CDj2\<G5C {
    
}

.\.\/_b\.module_\.\/_b-1--\/__Ptm3Y5\<Ptm {
    color: red;
}
.\.\/_b\.module_\.\/_b--\/__Jp_9KL\<Jp_ {
    
}
.\.\/_style\.module_\.\/_chain2--\/__lZ7t82\<lZ7 {
  
  
  background: blue;
}

.\.\/_style\.module_\.\/_chain1--\/__FPKMu-\<FPK {
  
  
  
  background: green;
}

.\.\/_style\.module_\.\/_root-class--\/__cpoIba\<cpo {
  
  
  
  background: red;
}


```

```js title=main.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);
/* import */ var _style_module_css__rspack_import_0 = __webpack_require__("./style.module.css");



},
"./b.module.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var exports = {
  "b-1": "./_b.module_./_b-1--/__Ptm3Y5<Ptm",
  "b": "./_b.module_./_b--/__Jp_9KL<Jp_" + " " + "./_b.module_./_b-1--/__Ptm3Y5<Ptm",
};

__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = exports);


},
"./d.module.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var exports = {
  "d-1": "./_d.module_./_d-1--/__HsdNMd<Hsd",
  "d": "./_d.module_./_d--/__G5CDj2<G5C" + " " + "./_d.module_./_d-1--/__HsdNMd<Hsd",
};

__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = exports);


},
"./f.module.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var exports = {
  "f-1": "./_f.module_./_f-1--/__idIkJ-<idI",
  "f": "./_f.module_./_f--/__qZ3ONg<qZ3" + " " + "./_f.module_./_f-1--/__idIkJ-<idI",
};

__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = exports);


},
"./style.module.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var exports = {
  "chain2": "./_style.module_./_chain2--/__lZ7t82<lZ7" + " " + "e" + " " + __webpack_require__("./f.module.css")["f"],
  "chain1": "./_style.module_./_chain1--/__FPKMu-<FPK" + " " + "./_style.module_./_chain2--/__lZ7t82<lZ7" + " " + "e" + " " + __webpack_require__("./f.module.css")["f"] + " " + "c" + " " + __webpack_require__("./d.module.css")["d"],
  "root-class": "./_style.module_./_root-class--/__cpoIba<cpo" + " " + "./_style.module_./_chain1--/__FPKMu-<FPK" + " " + "./_style.module_./_chain2--/__lZ7t82<lZ7" + " " + "e" + " " + __webpack_require__("./f.module.css")["f"] + " " + "c" + " " + __webpack_require__("./d.module.css")["d"] + " " + "a" + " " + __webpack_require__("./b.module.css")["b"],
};

__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = exports);


},

},function(__webpack_require__) {
var __webpack_exec__ = function(moduleId) { return __webpack_require__(__webpack_require__.s = moduleId) }
var __webpack_exports__ = (__webpack_exec__("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
